series_metadata.series_description: Payment requests, applications and correspondence from parents, students and nursing instituions related to this program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: For awardees, retain correspondence, applications and copies of checks from institutions and Office of the Attorney General in office until cancellation/forgiveness or payment in full, then destroy. For non-awardees, retain correspondence and applications in office for 1 year, then destroy. For all administrative files, retain in office for 5 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: For awardees, retain names, Social Security Numbers and award amounts until cancellation/forgiveness or payment in full, then destroy. For non-awardees, retain names and Social Security Numbers for 1 year, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
